mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM song s INNER JOIN playlist_song ps ON s.id = ps.song_id WHERE ps.playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY ps.sort_order, ps.create_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND song_id = #{songId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist_song (playlist_id, song_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{songId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND song_id = #{songId}
